content: We couldn’t find a contact matching the Stripe email. Your billing and services will continue to work, but we recommend assigning a new Payer to manage billing settings in {{productName}}.

comment.text: This key displays a message to the user when a contact associated with the Stripe email address is not found. It appears in the Portal Settings, specifically within the payment settings section, and advises the user to assign a new payer to manage billing, reassuring them that services will continue uninterrupted. Translators should ensure the tone remains helpful and informative.
